titleStmt.title: SII 34.300: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 300. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the west wall of the old kitchen in the first prākāra in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Māṟavarman Vīrapāṇḍya, 29th year, Kārttigai 19 = A.D. 1325.
This is similar to the peace compact mentioned in No. 292 above between the araiya members of Pūvarasakuḻi and others. Perhaps this may represent the earlier stage of the conflict and settlement.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOmāṟu paṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉac cakravattikaḷ śivīrapāṇṭiya tEvar
kku yāṇṭu 2 10 9 vatu kāttikai 2 10 9 ḷ Irācarāca vaḷa nāṭṭu valla nāṭṭu Uṭaiyā
r tiruvarakuḷamuṭaiya nāyanār tirukkōyil tāṉattārkkum Ūrarkku
m pūvaracakuḻi Araiyamakkaḷil cūriyaṉ toṇṭaimāṉu makkaḷ marumakkaḷum cōḻi
yaṉ Ulaka māṇikkapparaiyaṉum makkaḷum pāṇit tēvarāṉa Īḻattarai
yar makaṉ vīramūvaṉ vicaiyar tēvaṉum vīramūvaṉ Īḻattaraiyaṉum tampiye
kkaṉum kalveṭṭi kuṭutta paricāvatu Aṭiyārkku nallāṉ tuṇṭarāyarai cun
taṉ nāraciṅka tēvan kuttukaiyil Inta pakaiyai nōkki Iṉpaṉ Ulakamā
ṇikkapparaiyaṉum pāṇittēvarāṉa Īḻattaraiyarum vāḻvaṉāna
Īḻattaraiyaṉum cuntan nāraciṅka tēvaraiyum cōḻaṉ Ulakamā
ṇikkapparaiyaṉaiyum kuttukaiyil Intap pakaiyeṉṟu co
llak kaṭavatalla Eṉṟu cantirādhittavaraikku cūriyaṉ toṇ
ṭaimānārum Ivar makkaḷum toṇṭaimānārum marumakkaḷāṉa cēra
cōḻa kōṉum Araṅkuttāṉum puttaṉum cōḻaṉ Araṅkuḷava nāṭṭarai
yaṉum Uṭappāṇṭāṉum Uḷḷiṭṭārum Āka Ivvanaivarum Intapa
kai Eṉṟu collakkaṭavōmalla Eṉṟu pakai Oruṅka tiru
malaiyil kalveṭṭikuṭuttōm Inta Iraṇṭu vakaiyil
maṉittarum Intappakaiyai nōkki varum nalantīṅku
Oruttarkku vantatu Aṉaivarkkum Eṉṟu Aṉupavi
kka kaṭavōmākavu
Digital edition of SII 34.300 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
